name: Venice Biennale
traditions: National pavilions in Giardini; Arsenale exhibitions; collateral events; Golden Lion awards; art installations across Venice.
historicalBackground: The Venice Biennale was founded in 1895 as one of the first international art exhibitions. It has expanded to include architecture, cinema, dance, music, and theater.
description: The world's most prestigious international art exhibition, showcasing contemporary art from over 80 countries across Venice's historic venues.
